description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage job named pages. Use the Docker image svilstrup/xsltproc with an entrypoint of ['/bin/sh','-c']. Run the script /builds/JeSuisUnDesDeux/jesuisundesdeux/datas/velomag/convert-xml-to-csv.sh. Publish the resulting public/ directory as a pages artifact. No additional stages, caches, or rules are defined.
